title: What's Your Favourite...?
questions: What's your favourite time of the day (and why)?
Where's your favourite place to study (and why)?
Who's your favourite and least favourite actor (and why)?
What are your favourite sports (and why)?
Where's your favourite place to go and relax and think about life?
What's your favourite expression in English?
What was your favourite TV programme when you were a child?
What's your favourite fast food and fast food restaurant?
What's your favourite 'English mistake' story?
What are your favourite clothes and clothes stores?
What are your favourite pieces of software and computer programmes?
Who are your favourite and least favourite teachers (and why)?
What were your favourite and least favourite subjects at school?
What are your least favourite words (in English and in your own language)?
What's your favourite and least favourite feature (this could be part of your face and body or your personality)?
What's your favourite song (and why)?
Who is your favourite and least favourite world leader (and why)?
What's your favourite joke? Tell it to me.
What's your favourite and least favourite time of the year (and why)?
Who is your favourite person in the whole wide world?
